creator: wen@FreeBSD.org
text:
Update to 0.6.20
When commit, many ports depend on it should be bumped PORTREVISION 
and should add a entry in vuxml to mention it.

Fix: PORTNAME=      libexif
-PORTVERSION=   0.6.18
-PORTREVISION=  1
+PORTVERSION=   0.6.20
 CATEGORIES=    graphics
 MASTER_SITES=  SF
